summary: Full backend + frontend coverage for MOTO Mayhem Rodeo. 18/18 pytest backend tests pass (auth, registrations, payments/Stripe, contact, admin CRUD & auth-gating). Frontend E2E validated: home content + live countdown, nav to all pages, register flow (Venmo/Cash success toast + Stripe test-mode redirect to checkout.stripe.com), contact form, admin login/dashboard/stats/toggle-paid/delete/logout with proper /admin -> /admin/login redirect when unauthenticated.

issues: /api/auth/me is called on every page load for anonymous visitors and returns 401, producing repeated 'Failed to load resource: 401' console errors. Not user-visible but noisy. Consider gating the initial me() check to /admin routes or swallowing 401 silently.

action_items: Optional: suppress AuthContext me() 401 console noise for anonymous public pages.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 407-line file; still readable but nearing threshold to split into auth/payments/admin modules as it grows.
seed_admin() updates the admin password if the configured value differs; credentials are intentionally omitted from tracked reports.
/api/payments/checkout responds with a real Stripe checkout session and inserts payment_transactions record (verified end-to-end).
Current auth accepts only the hardened HTTP-only admin cookie; bearer-token fallback was removed.
Current CORS policy permits explicit trusted origins, methods, and headers only.
Current production cookies use the __Host- prefix with Secure, HttpOnly, Path=/, and SameSite=Lax.
test_credentials: REDACTED — provide test-only credentials through environment variables.
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ created by pytest runs and Playwright register flows; visible in admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py; run with `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py`. Pytest config forces -n 2 loadscope. If reusing _reg_payload helper, note that empty-list default is handled via 'if classes is None' (do NOT switch to `classes or default` – empty list is falsy). Stripe is in test mode with price lookup_key 'rider_entry' ($100). Countdown target is 2026-07-25 — ticks live. AuthContext calls /api/auth/me on mount which produces expected 401s for anonymous users.
